title: Scape and Run: Holiday
description: Adds holiday decorations and themed items for parasites, creating a festive mood.
body:
Is an addon for [Scape and Run: Parasites](https://modrinth.com/mod/scapeandrunparasites) that modifies the parasite models to add holiday decorations. The addon also features holiday items that can serve as decorative or functional elements in the game.

![rupter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf701a3f7be9fd6119bd7ab28c7743014604b536.png)
![sim_enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32aed41f9e64e6ea62a1ef158c3924c6a150c2e5.png)
![pri_bolster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef58c60194a6affa97e335492fa8addd37046153.png)
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e46d7b61a15ab7b7982fe4ffefce504a46a8844.png)
